title: chrysanthemum artemisioides
intro: Chrysanthemum artemisioides, also known as the Chinese mugwort or wormwood chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is widely used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving menstrual cramps, improving digestion, and reducing fever, as well as its ability to ward off internal parasites. Chrysanthemum artemisioides is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
